Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\(''sharp''\); sharp\(''c:/Users/Microsoft/repair-center/nvidiageforce.avif''\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\(''nvidia:'', m.width, ''x'', m.height, ''channels:'', m.channels, ''hasAlpha:'', m.hasAlpha\)\); sharp\(''c:/Users/Microsoft/repair-center/amd.avif''\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\(''amd:'', m.width, ''x'', m.height, ''channels:'', m.channels, ''hasAlpha:'', m.hasAlpha\)\);")
